top_signals.title: Three Dead After Supply Boat Sinks in Singapore
top_signals.summary: A supply boat sunk off Pasir Panjang Terminal on June 12 at about 9.30am after colliding with a landing craft. The Maritime and Port Authority of Singapore (MPA), Police Coast Guard and SCDF Marine Division, immediately activated their crafts…

top_signals.title: Subsea Global Solutions Launches New C-ROV Services
top_signals.summary: Subsea Global Solutions announced the official launch of their C-ROV hull cleaning services in Belgium, effective July 2026, with operations based out of Antwerp. This expansion further strengthens Subsea Global Solutions’ environmental service…
